ApiKeyAuth.description: Per-caller API key presented in the X-API-Key request header.
ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key

info.description: Implementer's public contract for Use Case C (API Contract Guard). This document plane is linted by the ground-truth linter and must align with base_schema.json; the runtime server (main.py) must match it exactly.
info.title: Profile API Contract

get.description: Read the calling user's profile, identified by the X-API-Key.

200.description: The caller's profile. Exposes user_uuid only; never the internal integer id.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 Z timestamp of the last update.

user_uuid.description: Public resource UUID of the user.

message.description: Human-readable error message; never leaks internals.
Human-readable error message; never leaks internals.

post.description: Update the calling user's display_name. The mutation is in-memory only; the storage DB is read-only.

display_name.description: New non-empty display name for the caller.

200.description: Update accepted. Exposes user_uuid only; never the internal integer id.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 Z timestamp assigned to this update.

user_uuid.description: Public resource UUID of the updated user.

400.description: Malformed body: unparseable JSON, or missing/empty/wrong-typed display_name. The message never contains a traceback, file path, source line, SQL, or sqlite3 text.

message.description: Human-readable error message; never leaks internals.
Human-readable error message; never leaks internals.
Human-readable error message; never leaks internals.
